backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing a barcode label printing system with authorization, user profiles, print job history, serial number tracking, and configurable label settings including layout and barcode positioning.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state to new state, specifically updating label settings to use 58mm width and 43mm height dimensions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: label dimension updates to 58mm×43mm, barcode width adjustments, prefix validation with error handling, and duplicate serial detection.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend TypeScript/React files covering authentication, UI components, tabs, hooks, services, and state management stores for the label printing application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color schemes for the application UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag and title for the barcode and label printing system.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping the app with ErrorBoundary and PasswordSessionProvider, conditionally rendering LockScreen or AppShell based on session lock state.
frontend/src/audio/soundSystem.ts: Zustand store managing sound settings (success, error, print complete) with custom sound support, volume control, and Web Audio API-based beep generation and playback functions.
frontend/src/auth/passwordSession.ts: Manages password session storage in localStorage with 8-hour expiration, validating credentials against configured expected password.
frontend/src/auth/PasswordSessionProvide: React context provider that manages password-based session state (locked/unlocked) with unlock and lock functions, checking session validity on mount.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: Main application shell with header, tabbed navigation (Scan & Print, Label Settings, Devices, Diagnostics), lock button, and footer.
frontend/src/components/BackendAvailabil: Badge component that displays a warning when the backend is unavailable, hidden when backend is reachable.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary component that catches errors and displays a fallback UI with a refresh button.
frontend/src/components/HeaderDeviceCont: Header component displaying printer connection status badge and optional wake lock toggle switch.
frontend/src/components/SerialTypeCounte: Displays print count cards for each configured prefix mapping from label settings, showing empty state if no mappings exist.
frontend/src/components/SoundEffectsSett: UI component for configuring sound effects per event type (success, error, printComplete) with built-in and custom sound support, including upload and test functionality.
frontend/src/config/lockScreenConfig.ts: Configuration module that returns the lock screen password, defaulting to 'swh1400' or using VITE_LOCK_PASSWORD environment variable.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor with authentication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for print job operations (submit, get history, increase count) with error handling for canister stopped states and backend availability tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useWakeLock.ts: Custom hook that manages screen wake lock to prevent device sleep during printing operations, with localStorage persistence and automatic re-acquisition on visibility change.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark warehouse theme, blue accents, custom CSS variables for colors, and tablet-optimized touch targets (44px minimum).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/printing/barcodePreview.ts: Generates deterministic SVG barcode representations for preview purposes by creating bar patterns from character codes without external barcode libraries.
frontend/src/printing/cpclBarcodeDiagnos: Provides validation and diagnostic logging for CPCL barcode generation, checking data validity, positioning bounds, and height calculations with structured error reporting.
frontend/src/printing/cpclBarcodeMapping: Maps UI barcode types (CODE128, EAN13, etc.) to CPCL printer tokens with recommended width/ratio parameters and fallback handling for unsupported types.
frontend/src/printing/cpclGenerator.ts: Generates CPCL printer command strings for labels, test prints, and calibration patterns with barcode positioning, scale clamping, and comprehensive diagnostic logging.
frontend/src/printing/cpclLayoutAdjustme: Provides utilities to clamp barcode X positions within label boundaries to prevent clipping, and estimates CODE128 barcode widths in dots based on data length and CPCL parameters.
frontend/src/printing/LabelPreview.tsx: React component that renders a visual preview of label layout with zoom controls, sample serial inputs, and applies calibration offsets and barcode positioning adjustments.
frontend/src/printing/previewUnits.ts: Defines unit conversion constants and functions for translating between millimeters, printer dots (203 DPI), and CSS pixels for preview rendering.
frontend/src/screens/LockScreen.tsx: Renders a password-protected lock screen that uses the PasswordSessionProvider to unlock the barcode and label printing system.
frontend/src/screens/PasswordSessionWiri: Displays an error screen when the password session system is not properly configured, offering refresh and troubleshooting guidance.
frontend/src/services/printerService.ts: Zustand store managing USB printer connection state, CPCL transmission, and test print functionality via the WebUSB transport layer.
frontend/src/services/usbCpclTransport.t: WebUSB transport layer for discovering, connecting to, and sending CPCL data to USB label printers with bulk OUT endpoint communication.
frontend/src/state/backendAvailabilitySt: Zustand store tracking backend availability status, last error messages, and timestamps for success/error events.
frontend/src/state/diagnosticsStore.ts: Persisted Zustand store tracking scan counts, print counts, errors, and per-type counters for diagnostics and usage analytics.
frontend/src/state/labelSettingsStore.ts: Zustand store for label settings with localStorage persistence, BigInt serialization support, and migration logic. Manages label dimensions, barcode layouts, prefix mappings, and calibration offsets with default values for 58mm × 43mm labels.
frontend/src/state/logStore.ts: Zustand store for system logs with persistence, maintaining up to 1000 log entries with timestamps, levels (info/warn/error), and optional metadata. Exports hooks and functions for adding and retrieving logs.
frontend/src/state/printHistoryStore.ts: Zustand store for print history with persistence, storing up to 1000 print entries with CPCL data. Provides reprint functionality that resends stored CPCL commands to the printer.
frontend/src/state/useLabelSettingsHydra: React hook that tracks whether the label settings store has finished hydrating from localStorage, useful for distinguishing between unloaded and default states.
frontend/src/tabs/DevicesTab.tsx: React component for managing printer connections via USB with WebUSB support detection. Displays connection status, provides connect/disconnect controls, and includes test print functionality with Bluetooth not supported notice.
frontend/src/tabs/DiagnosticsTab.tsx: React component with three tabs showing system diagnostics: statistics (total scans, prints, errors by type), print history with reprint capability, and filterable system logs.
frontend/src/tabs/LabelSettingsTab.tsx: React component for configuring label settings including dimensions, barcode layouts, prefix mappings, calibration offsets, and sound effects. Includes preview, import/export, test print, and calibration pattern printing features.
frontend/src/tabs/ScanPrintTab.tsx: React component for two-step serial scanning workflow with validation, duplicate detection, and automatic printing. Handles prefix mapping, backend submission, printer communication, and displays serial type counters with error handling.
frontend/src/utils/barcodeSettingsValida: Validates barcode and layout settings for CPCL printers, checking supported barcode types (CODE128, CODE39, EAN13, etc.), scale values, and computed heights in dots to ensure barcodes will be visible when printed.
frontend/src/utils/icErrors.ts: Detects and formats Internet Computer operational errors, specifically IC0508 canister stopped errors, and provides user-friendly messages indicating that printing can continue locally when the backend is unavailable.
frontend/src/utils/labelSettingsErrors.t: Parses label settings update errors and returns user-friendly messages for authorization failures, network errors, duplicate serials, and unknown prefixes, with special handling for canister stopped errors.
frontend/src/utils/labelSettingsImportEx: Handles import/export of label settings with BigInt serialization, migrates old settings structures to new layout-based format, and validates imported settings including barcode configuration and layout parameters.
frontend/src/utils/labelTypes.ts: Provides centralized label type definitions (built-in types like Dual Band, Tri Band) and utilities to extract custom types from prefix mappings, generate display names, and retrieve all available label types sorted by built-in status and name.
frontend/src/utils/scanPrintErrors.ts: Formats printer, transport, and backend errors into concise user-facing messages for the Scan & Print workflow, handling duplicate serials, unknown prefixes, authorization issues, and distinguishing non-blocking backend failures from critical errors.
frontend/src/utils/serialNormalization.t: Normalizes scanned serial numbers by trimming whitespace and removing common barcode scanner suffix characters (CR, LF, Tab) that may be appended during scanning.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence for parameters like admin tokens and functions to clear sensitive parameters from the URL after extraction.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for borders/shadows/animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking for a barcode label printing app with 58mm×43mm labels, documenting four implemented features (label dimensions, barcode width, prefix validation with auto-clear, duplicate serial detection) and three pending feature requests.
